case_title: DARRELL EUGENE JOHNSON VS. SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF DEPT.COUNTY JAIL\MEDICAL- FILED PURSUANT TO LITIGANT'S REQUEST -

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DARRELL EUGENE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF DEPT.COUNTY JAIL\MEDICAL DEPT. (SHERIFF MIKIRIMI)
CORRESPONDENCE RECIEVED FROM PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DARRELL EUGENE

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED PURSUANT TO LITIGANT'S REQUEST - FILED BY JOHNSON, DARRELL EUGENE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF DEPT.COUNTY JAIL\MEDICAL DEPT. (SHERIFF MIKIRIMI) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ADDITIONAL PAPERS WITH FILE SEE NOTES

REMARK: RECEIVED PLAINTIFF'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT. AS MATTER WAS DISMISSED, COPY OF DISMISSAL AND SC-105 FORM MAILED TO PLAINTIFF IN CARE OF CORCORAN STATE PRISON.
FILED ANSWER TO SC-105 REQUEST FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF DEPT.COUNTY JAIL\MEDICAL DEPT. (SHERIFF MIKIRIMI) AS TO PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DARRELL EUGENE
CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLAINTIFF TO JUDGE MITCHELL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DARRELL EUGENE
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILED SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DARRELL EUGENE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF DEPT.COUNTY JAIL\MEDICAL DEPT. (SHERIFF MIKIRIMI)
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL (CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS) SF GH 10001 POTREO 94110
FILED SC-104A PROOF OF MAILING (SUBSTITUTED SERVICE) RE SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER - FILED BY PLAINTIFF.

ORDER ON (SC-105A) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS: DENIED. THE COURT DOES NOT HAVE JURISDICTION OVER A DEFENDANT WHO HAS NOT BEEN PROPERLY SERVED. PROPER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. AN INCARCERATED PARTY IS ENTITLED TO WAIVE PERSONAL APPEARANCE AND SUBMIT WRITTEN DECLARATIONS TO SERVE AS EVIDENCE OR ALLOW A NON-ATTORNEY PERSON TO APPEAR.
